title: Add SQLite content schema and repository
description: 建立 SQLite 内容库和类型化读取/写入边界，保存攻略、标签、发布状态和正文 Markdown。
acceptance_criteria: WHEN database schema is initialized THEN guides and guide_tags tables exist; WHEN repository reads guides THEN it returns slug,title,excerpt,coverUrl,tags,source,updatedAt,readingMinutes,status; WHEN upserting same slug THEN existing guide is updated without duplicate tags; ref: docs/approved-sqlite-oss-publish-plan.md:28
review_initial_requirements: 检查 SQLite 文件路径可通过环境变量配置；检查 schema 不存图片二进制；检查 repository 不依赖 Next build 阶段。
review_regression_requirements: 回归检查现有 getAllGuides/getGuideBySlug 的调用方有兼容路径；检查缺库或空库时错误清晰且不伪造数据。
notes: source_doc:docs/approved-sqlite-oss-publish-plan.md; assumption:use Prisma+SQLite unless implementation discovery proves better-sqlite3 is materially simpler; picked_reason:P0 foundation for publish API and frontend data contract; decision:use better-sqlite3 for lightweight runtime instead of Prisma; done_at:2026-06-09; skills_used:find-docs; mcp_used:none; evidence:npm run check:sqlite-contract passed; evidence:npm run check:guide-contract passed; review_initial:database path configurable via DATABASE_URL and schema stores URLs/markdown not image binaries; review_regression:getAllGuides/getGuideBySlug fall back to markdown when SQLite file absent; continue_now:PLAN-02 Add OSS image upload adapter

title: Add OSS image upload adapter
description: 接入阿里云 OSS 上传图片能力，使用 OSS_PUBLIC_BASE_URL 生成公网图片 URL，图片不进入 Git 和 SQLite。
acceptance_criteria: WHEN OSS env vars are present THEN local image upload returns a public URL under OSS_PUBLIC_BASE_URL; WHEN env vars are missing THEN script fails with explicit missing key names; WHEN same image is uploaded THEN object key includes content hash to avoid stale CDN cache; ref: docs/approved-sqlite-oss-publish-plan.md:63
review_initial_requirements: 检查 AccessKey 不写入代码或提交文件；检查对象 key 使用 guides/<slug>/<hash>-<filename>；检查 CDN HTTPS 未签发时可切换 base URL。
review_regression_requirements: 回归检查本地无 OSS 凭据时不会误判上传成功；检查上传结果只写 URL，不写图片二进制到数据库。
notes: source_doc:docs/approved-sqlite-oss-publish-plan.md; risk:medium OSS CDN certificate may still be pending, use OSS_PUBLIC_BASE_URL as switchable public URL; picked_reason:P0 required before publish command can move images out of Git/public assets; done_at:2026-06-09; skills_used:find-docs; mcp_used:none; evidence:npm run check:oss-contract passed; evidence:npm run check:sqlite-contract passed; review_initial:AccessKey only read from env and object key uses guides/<slug>/<hash>-<filename>; review_regression:missing OSS env fails explicitly and dry-run only returns URL not image binary; validation_limited:real OSS upload deferred to PLAN-03/PLAN-06 because adapter contract should not upload throwaway objects; continue_now:PLAN-03 Build guide publish command

title: Build guide publish command
description: 实现本地发布命令，解析 Obsidian Markdown，上传图片到 OSS，替换正文图片 URL，并通过 SSH/SCP 将 payload 写入服务器 SQLite。
acceptance_criteria: WHEN npm run publish:guide <md> runs with a valid guide THEN images are uploaded, markdown image refs are replaced with public URLs, and server import upserts the guide; WHEN required frontmatter or image is missing THEN the command fails before writing SQLite; WHEN same slug is published twice THEN the guide updates in place; ref: docs/approved-sqlite-oss-publish-plan.md:57
review_initial_requirements: 检查发布命令不开放公网写入 API；检查 SSH/SCP 目标路径可配置；检查失败时不会留下半写入 SQLite 状态。
review_regression_requirements: 回归检查现有 5 篇文章可作为迁移源发布；检查 ![[name.png]] 与 ![[name.png|560]] 都能解析。

title: Add runtime guide API to static server
description: 在低内存静态服务中增加运行时 JSON API，从服务器 SQLite 返回攻略列表和详情，避免切回 next start。
acceptance_criteria: WHEN GET /api/guides is requested THEN it returns published guide summaries from SQLite; WHEN GET /api/guides/<slug> is requested THEN it returns guide detail markdown and tags; WHEN slug is missing THEN API returns 404 JSON; ref: docs/approved-sqlite-oss-publish-plan.md:82
review_initial_requirements: 检查 API 不需要服务器侧 Next build；检查 SQLite path/env 在部署包内外都可配置；检查错误响应结构明确。
review_regression_requirements: 回归检查静态首页、攻略、资料、favicon、_next assets 仍由 static-mvp-server 正常服务。
notes: source_doc:docs/approved-sqlite-oss-publish-plan.md; picked_reason:P0 runtime API unlocks static shell content reads without next start; done_at:2026-06-09; skills_used:none; mcp_used:none; evidence:npm run check:static-api-contract passed; evidence:npm run check:publish-contract passed; review_initial:static-mvp-server handles /api/guides and /api/guides/<slug> from SQLite without Next build/runtime API; review_regression:static contract keeps API before static route fallback and returns JSON 404 for missing slug; continue_now:PLAN-05 Convert guide pages to API-backed static shells

title: Convert guide pages to API-backed static shells
description: 将首页、攻略列表和攻略详情改为静态壳，通过运行时 API 加载 SQLite 内容，同时保留移动端阅读体验。
acceptance_criteria: WHEN homepage loads THEN it fetches guide summaries and renders latest content; WHEN /guides loads THEN it renders API-backed guide list; WHEN /guides/<slug> loads THEN it renders detail markdown, CDN images, TOC, and back path without horizontal overflow; ref: docs/approved-sqlite-oss-publish-plan.md:88
review_initial_requirements: 检查静态壳有 loading/error/empty 状态；检查不引入重筛选或后台编辑功能；检查移动端触控目标和图片宽度。
review_regression_requirements: 回归检查首页、攻略列表、详情页、资料入口风格一致；Chrome DevTools 移动端无横向滚动且 CDN 图片加载。

title: Migrate existing guides and deploy runtime content flow
description: 将现有 5 篇攻略通过新发布链路写入服务器 SQLite，部署最新静态服务，并验证线上发布后立刻可见。
acceptance_criteria: WHEN existing 5 guides are published through the new command THEN SQLite contains all guides and tags; WHEN latest deploy is uploaded THEN PM2 serves static shell plus runtime API; WHEN a newly published guide is added after deploy THEN /guides shows it without Next rebuild or PM2 restart; ref: docs/approved-sqlite-oss-publish-plan.md:94
review_initial_requirements: 检查部署仍只上传本地构建产物和运行时脚本，不在服务器 build；检查 SQLite 有备份或可恢复的迁移源。
review_regression_requirements: 回归检查 PM2 内存稳定、Nginx 3002 代理可用、线上首页/列表/详情/API 全部返回最新 SQLite 内容。

title: Review documented vision against delivered work
description: Use a same-model sub-agent review to compare approved-doc claims with delivered behavior, evidence level, CSV state, validation evidence, and review log.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN all non-review issues before this row are closed THEN run same-model sub-agent review against source-specific claim/evidence checks; WHEN gaps or overstated claims are found THEN append follow-up issues and REVIEW-02; WHEN no gaps remain THEN close the CSV; ref: docs/approved-sqlite-oss-publish-plan.md:1
review_initial_requirements: Verify all prior non-review rows are closed before running this review.
review_regression_requirements: Check that publishing a guide writes server SQLite without rebuild; check images are OSS/CDN URLs not Git/public assets; check runtime API and static shells use SQLite data; check validation_limited is recorded for any unavailable OSS/CDN certificate path.
